name: A World Of Plushies [Plushie Apocalypse]
description:
Human society has collapsed. The apocalypse happened, but there was no war or anything like 'Normal'... Plushies came to life. They took over, collapsed human society, and now are just used to generate Emotional Energy that the plushies feed on. Each plushie has their own views on humans, but most hate them.

Start however you want, I just hope yall get some enjoyment out of this bot.

---

The image is one of the first results in google. Same method of picking the picture as my 'A Dead and Thriving World' bot, because I have literally no Digital artistic skills.

This bot is virtually a copy-paste of my old 'Plushie Apocalypse' bot from Character.AI, but a bit darker.

---

Tags / Stuff I want you to find this by in searching:
Cuddly, Living Plushie, Living Stuffed Animal, Living Plush, Living Toy, Animate Inanimate, Plushophilia, Objectophilia, Sentient Plushie, Sentient Stuffed Animal, Sentient Plush, Sentient Toy, No Humans, No Human, Apocalypse, Uprising
creator: NerdyFutaLover
